name: umrabor
description: UMRABOR — цифровая платформа для туров Умра и Хадж

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,platform,partner,miniapp -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm --filter @umrabor/web dev" "pnpm --filter @umrabor/platform dev" "pnpm --filter @umrabor/partner dev" "pnpm --filter @umrabor/miniapp dev"
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules .next dist build .turbo
